allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['id'], a['title'][:60]\) for a in d['data']['items']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('id:', d['data']['id'], 'provider:', d['data']['llm_provider']\)")

Bash(curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:8080/api/v1/preferences -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"keywords":"[\\"go\\",\\"rust\\"]","llm_model":"deepseek-chat","max_briefing_articles":5}' echo "" echo "=== GET briefings ===")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/briefings echo "" echo "=== DELETE source ===")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('provider:', d['llm_provider'], '\\nmodel:', d['llm_model'], '\\napikey_set:', bool\(d['llm_api_key']\), '\\nbaseurl:', d['llm_base_url']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('sources:', len\(d\) if d else 0\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for item in d['data']['items']: print\(f\\"ID:{item['id']} status:{item['status']} title:{item['title'][:30]} articles:{item['article_count']} content_len:{len\(item['content_markdown']\)}\\"\) if item['status'] == 'failed': print\(f' error: {item.get\(\\"error_message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) ")
